errors.sending timeout: Timeout while sending message to device: device did not respond in time
errors.decrypt_keylength: Cannot decrypt response: invalid key length.
errors.discover_local_ip: Cannot discover devices: local IP address unknown.
errors.save_settings_nocmd: Cannot save changes: command  __cmd__ is not known yet
errors.save_settings_exist: Cannot save changes: command  __cmd__ already exists
errors.sensor_check: Cannot get sensor values from device

pair.title: Pair Broadlink Device
pair.intro:
Configure the device with the Broadlink / e-Control app on a smartphone, ensure it's NOT locked.
Get the IP address from your wifi router.
pair.error_no_discover: No device discovered. Did you switch it on, and is it connectect to your WiFi network ?

settings.title: Broadlink Debug Settings
settings.compatinfo: In compatibility mode, any device found during pairing will be accepted as the selected device type. This means the device paired will be treated as the choosen device type. As a result, not all (if any) of the capablities of the device will work properly
settings.debuginfo: Enable this setting before sending your diagnostic report to the developer.
settings.command_manager_subtitle: Manage learned commands and generate experimental Pronto Hex from IR captures.
settings.pronto_carrier_hint: Used for the next Pronto Hex conversion. Keep 38000 unless the controlled device's carrier is known; other values, including 56000, are experimental.
settings.pronto_instructions: Paste this code into Homey's System → Send infrared Flow card. Use repetitions 1 for the first test. The carrier was assumed, not measured by Broadlink.

rf_learn.long_press: Keep remote button pressed until LED turns off
rf_learn.multi_presses: Now keep press button repeatedly and shortly until LED turns off
